name: easy-planning-poker
description: Scrum Planning Poker App - Full Stack Monorepo Manager

scripts.bootstrap: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:prod: npm run build --prefix frontend --omit=dev && npm run build --prefix backend --omit=dev
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
